segments.text: But these single blocks are forcing him to jump not using the Mythra's ability to run fast
Yeah, and he's actually breaking the wall for the syrup at the time and Leo gets there. He's already gone
Oh look at that, barely misses the pop out of that, but nothing to worry about

full_text: But these single blocks are forcing him to jump not using the Mythra's ability to run fast Yeah, and he's actually breaking the wall for the syrup at the time and Leo gets there. He's already gone Oh look at that, barely misses the pop out of that, but nothing to worry about
